race.comment: Lindsay Park has found a great race for BIT OF SHOOSH (1) after a couple of runs back. Missed the placings first-up in 62 grade then ran a better race when he did his best work late and finished 2.25 lengths away fourth here. Should be at peak fitness now and looks the testing material. TARSHIN (10) knuckled down strongly to get within 1.3 lengths of the winner over 1600m last start. Back in trip here but trained on the track and has at least raced her way into form. HIDDEN WITNESS (7) was doing her best work late last start to get up for third over 1312m at Geelong. Blinkers come off. Expected to be competitive.  SHORT REPLY (6) ran a much-improved race last start when specked at a big price and might be ready to peak here. Just needs to overcome the tricky gate. SNAPPY BEAU (2) has been in stronger races than this at his three runs since the impressive first-up win and while the form doesn't read well, he strikes the right race to improve.
